applied_optimizations.name: Add stride parameters (Kap, Kbp) to wvSplitK kernels
applied_optimizations.description: Added Kap (activation stride) and Kbp (weight stride) parameters to wvSplitK_hf_sml_, wvSplitK_hf_, and wvSplitK_hf_big_ kernels. Updated all memory access patterns to use strides instead of assuming stride==K. Updated dispatch macros to pass strides from tensor metadata. Removed is_contiguous() guard from use_skinny condition in utils.py to allow padded tensors to use the optimized kernel path.

hotspot_targets.reason: Skinny GEMM kernel takes 94.67% of GPU time. Needed stride support for non-contiguous tensors.
hotspot_targets.next_step: Complete - stride parameters added and verified

notes: The FP8 variant wvSplitKQ already had Kap/Kbp stride parameters - used as reference pattern
Three kernel variants needed changes: wvSplitK_hf_sml_ (small A fits LDS), wvSplitK_hf_ (medium A), wvSplitK_hf_big_ (large A with PCML chunking)
Key insight: A is loaded flat into LDS but with strided source - needed row/col decomposition for A load addresses
B (weight) accesses changed from K to Kbp stride, A memory accesses (non-LDS path) changed to use Kap
wvSplitKrc (reduce-counting) path was NOT modified - is_contiguous guard kept for that path

applied_optimizations.name: Verified stage1 implementation intact
applied_optimizations.description: Confirmed that all stage1 changes (Kap/Kbp stride parameters in all three wvSplitK kernel variants, updated dispatch macros, removed is_contiguous() guard) are intact and the _rocm_C.abi3.so binary is built and up-to-date. Score: 100.0/100.0.

hotspot_targets.reason: Implementation complete - stride parameters added and verified

notes: All changes from stage1 were already built and intact
Score: 100.0/100.0 - all 4 tiers passed: profiling (15/15), padded correctness (40/40), non-padded regression (20/20), integration (25/25)
No rebuild was needed - _rocm_C.abi3.so timestamp was newer than skinny_gemms.cu source

applied_optimizations.name: Final verification - all edge cases and integration checks pass

hotspot_targets.reason: Implementation complete - all edge cases verified
hotspot_targets.next_step: No further changes needed - perfect score achieved

notes: All edge cases pass including bonus tests with non-standard dimensions

global_notes: Complete implementation: stride parameters (Kap, Kbp) added to all three wvSplitK kernel variants
is_contiguous() guard removed from utils.py to allow padded tensors through optimized path
Perfect 100.0/100.0 score maintained across all 3 stages
